title: Irish Luck
writer: Norman Venner (story "The Imperfect Imposter"), Thomas J. Geraghty (scenario)
actors: Thomas Meighan, Lois Wilson, Cecil Humphreys, Claude King
plot: Tom Donahue, a New York City traffic-policeman on Fifth Avenue, wins a newspaper popularity contest, and decides to take a trip to Ireland to visit his family. Once there, he becomes ...
